ListSnapchain.orderBy: Sort field, options: chainId (snapshot chain ID, default), chainSize (snapshot chain size), volumeSize (disk size)
ListSnapchain.order: Sort order, options: asc (ascending, default), desc (descending)
ListSnapchain.pageSize: Number of results per page, default is 1000
ListSnapchain.volumeId: Disk ID; if specified, only returns snapshot chain info for that disk
